inputs.titre: Construction de la Sainte-Chapelle à Paris par Saint Louis pour abriter les reliques de la Passion

reason: This image is not suitable. The man's clothing (jeans and t-shirt) and modern scaffolding are anachronistic. The presence of modern buildings in the background, street signs, a car, and modern materials like plastic sheeting definitively disqualify it for depicting the 13th-century construction of Sainte-Chapelle. There's also a sign on the wall with modern lettering.
